low effort slop, next…

For some reason, my motivation to make PM bots has currently burned out of steam for good, as it’s now done for a while.

So I technically have nothing to do anymore with the bots, this could be the finale of my journey here, however. Still many ideas flowing around.

Like usual, proxy is on since I don’t want to get notified about proxy and thank you guys as always, send feedback so I can further improve on bots in the soon future and fix older bots.

He’s not done yet, he still has enough energy left to make a few more PM bots.
